info.title: Runly.Cli
info.description: CLI for managing Runly and running a node.

commands.name: clear
commands.description:
Clears the local package cache, causing packages to be
downloaded for future runs.

commands.name: list
commands.description: Lists the packages in the local package cache.

options.name: -p
options.description:
(Default: false) Displays the list of jobs in each package. When
combined with -v, displays the config type and default config for
each job.

commands.name: set-apikey
commands.description: Stores the cluster API key in the user's profile.

options.name: -s
options.description:
In Windows, writes the API key to the system profile
(%SystemRoot%\System32\config\systemprofile) instead of
current user's profile. This will set the API key for the
node service when it is running as Local System.

arguments.name: API Key
arguments.description:
The cluster key used to authenticate with the
Runly API when starting a node.

commands.name: start-node
commands.description:
Starts a node to run jobs on this machine, connecting to the
Runly API using the cluster key provided by the -k parameter or
the key stored using the command 'runly set-apikey'.

options.name: --key
options.description:
The cluster key used to authenticate with the Runly API. If not
specified the default API key set by the command `runly
set-apikey` is used.

options.name: -d
options.description:
Runs jobs with the debug flag, prompting the user to attach a
debugger.

options.name: -v
options.description:
(Default: false) Displays debug level logging instead of
information level logging.
